result.stdout:
USAGE:
    schost [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    schost init
    schost init MyApp/MyApp.csproj
    schost run
    schost run --no-build
    schost run --inline

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    init       Initialize schost.json for a project             
    run        Build and launch the app in a configured terminal
    pack       Package the app for distribution                 
    install    Register/unregister terminal profile

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    schost [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    schost init
    schost init MyApp/MyApp.csproj
    schost run
    schost run --no-build
    schost run --inline

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    init       Initialize schost.json for a project             
    run        Build and launch the app in a configured terminal
    pack       Package the app for distribution                 
    install    Register/unregister terminal profile

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Initialize schost.json for a project

USAGE:
    schost init [project] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    schost init
    schost init MyApp/MyApp.csproj

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Path to .csproj file or directory

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help            Prints help information               
    -v, --version         Prints version information            
        --title           Window title                          
        --font            Font face                             
        --font-size       Font size                             
        --columns         Terminal columns                      
        --rows            Terminal rows                         
        --color-scheme    Color scheme (WT name)                
    -y, --yes             Skip interactive prompts, use defaults

        --columns         Terminal columns                      
        --rows            Terminal rows                         
        --color-scheme    Color scheme (WT name)                
    -y, --yes             Skip interactive prompts, use defaults

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Register/unregister terminal profile

USAGE:
    schost install [project] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    schost install --exe path/to/app.exe
    schost install --uninstall

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Path to .csproj file or directory

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help         Prints help information     
    -v, --version      Prints version information  
        --exe          Path to the built executable
        --uninstall    Uninstall instead of install

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Register/unregister terminal profile

USAGE:
    schost install [project] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    schost install --exe path/to/app.exe
    schost install --uninstall

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Path to .csproj file or directory

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help         Prints help information     
    -v, --version      Prints version information  
        --exe          Path to the built executable
        --uninstall    Uninstall instead of install

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Package the app for distribution

USAGE:
    schost pack [project] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    schost pack
    schost pack --installer
    schost pack -r win-x64

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Path to .csproj file or directory

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                      
    -v, --version              Prints version information                   
    -o, --output               Output directory                             
    -r, --runtime              Runtime identifier (e.g., win-x64, linux-x64)
        --installer            Build Inno Setup installer (Windows only)    
        --no-trim              Disable IL trimming                          
        --no-self-contained    Do not bundle the .NET runtime

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Package the app for distribution

USAGE:
    schost pack [project] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    schost pack
    schost pack --installer
    schost pack -r win-x64

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Path to .csproj file or directory

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                      
    -v, --version              Prints version information                   
    -o, --output               Output directory                             
    -r, --runtime              Runtime identifier (e.g., win-x64, linux-x64)
        --installer            Build Inno Setup installer (Windows only)    
        --no-trim              Disable IL trimming                          
        --no-self-contained    Do not bundle the .NET runtime

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Build and launch the app in a configured terminal

USAGE:
    schost run [project] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    schost run
    schost run --no-build
    schost run --inline

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Path to .csproj file or directory

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help        Prints help information                   
    -v, --version     Prints version information                
        --no-build    Skip building before launch               
        --inline      Run in current terminal (for debugging/CI)

        --no-build    Skip building before launch               
        --inline      Run in current terminal (for debugging/CI)
